story_headline: June GST collections rise 13.9% year-on-year to Rs 1.94 lakh crore

candidates.angle: Where the money actually went today — and why macro felt it.
The market moved today, but the real story was macro.
The real reason macro moved today.
Everyone watched the index. Few watched macro.
The market looked calm on the surface. Underneath, it wasn't.
You think the index tells the story. Today it didn't.
The market didn't move because of one stock. It moved because of macro.
Why macro changed the market mood today.
Today's market move, explained through macro, in 15 seconds.
Gross GST (June 2026): Rs 1,94,812 crore, +13.9% YoY — and it came down to one sector.
